init_hook: if [ ! -f yarn/.bin/ysc ]; then echo 'Building a self-contained ysc...'; git clone --recursive --depth 1 https://github.com/YarnSpinnerTool/YarnSpinner-Console.git .ysc-src && dotnet publish .ysc-src/src/YarnSpinner.Console/ysc.csproj -c Release -r osx-arm64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=false -o yarn/.bin/ && rm -rf .ysc-src; fi
